_comment: MCP config for the ONE gated live capture (see README → Record once). Launch `claude` from the kitsoki repo root with `--mcp-config tools/mcp-demo/mcp.capture.json`; the studio server resolves story.* writes under --stories-dir. Defaults to harness:replay (no LLM inside kitsoki) — the only model in the loop is the external `claude` agent being captured.
